summary: First iteration, full-stack testing of Ristorante La Cucina site. Backend pytest suite (7 tests) PASSED 100%. Frontend Playwright flows PASSED 100%: Hero CTA, Navbar (desktop + mobile), Menu tabs (pizza/pasta/specialita), Reservation validation + submission + persistence, Reviews slider (prev/next/dots), Contact (tel link, directions, Google Maps iframe, hours with Martedì Chiuso), Floating actions toggle (WhatsApp + Call).
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Reservation form has HTML5 `required` on name/people/date so the browser-native validation popup fires before the JS custom error banner for those fields. The JS custom errors for those fields ('Inserisci il nome', 'Seleziona una data') are effectively unreachable; only the phone-or-email rule (not covered by HTML required) reaches the custom banner. Not a bug, but consider removing `required` if a uniform custom banner is desired.
Minor: /api/reservations has no server-side date/time format validation (accepts any string). Consider validating 'YYYY-MM-DD' and 'HH:MM' with a regex/strptime to guard against bad client data.
Minor: CORS is wide-open (CORS_ORIGINS=*) with allow_credentials=True - combination is ignored by browsers but worth restricting to the real origin before production.
Nit: backend @app.on_event('shutdown') is deprecated in FastAPI; lifespan context is preferred.
seed_data_creation: Created 4 TEST_-prefixed reservations during testing and cleaned up after (delete_many on MongoDB 'test_database.reservations' where name starts with TEST_).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All flows verified against public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Note: Italian UI - Hero title 'Autentica Cucina Italiana nel cuore di Malvaglia', success screen 'Grazie, {name}!'. Date input uses min=todayISO() so always choose a date strictly in the future when scripting. Clean up TEST_-prefixed reservations via delete_many({name: /^TEST_/}). Reservations collection has no _id leakage (server projects {_id:0}).
